testcase.name: testPreviewStream

13:36:53.201 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.qiwenshare.file.FilePreviewTest]: FilePreviewTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 13:36:53.881 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.qiwenshare.file.FileApplication for test class com.qiwenshare.file.FilePreviewTest

[qiwen-file] [ main] o.h.c.internal.RegionFactoryInitiator : HHH000026: Second-level cache disabled 2026-06-29T13:37:13.147+08:00 INFO 6500 --- [qiwen-file] [ main] o.s.o.j.p.SpringPersistenceUnitInfo 2026-06-29T13:37:14.044+08:00 INFO 6500 --- [qiwen-file] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool : HikariPool-1 - Added connection conn0: url=jdbc:h2:mem:qiwen_file_test user=SA 2026-06-29T13:37:14.049+08:00 INFO 6500 --- [qiwen-file] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Start completed. 2026-06-29T13:37:14.182+08:00 WARN 6500 --- [qiwen-file] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: H2Dialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-06-29T13:37:18.459+08:00 INFO 6500 --- [qiwen-file] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists file_bean cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists file_classification cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists file_type cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists file_version cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists notice cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists permission cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists qiwen_user cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists role cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists role_permission cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists share_file cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists sys_config cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists upload_task cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists user_role cascade Hibernate: create table file_bean ( deleted integer, is_folder boolean, create_time timestamp(6), file_size bigint, update_time timestamp(6), file_name varchar(255), file_path varchar(255), file_type varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, parent_path varchar(255), user_id varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table file_classification ( file_type_id integer, id integer generated by default as identity, file_extend_name varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table file_type ( id integer generated by default as identity, order_num integer, name varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table file_version ( version integer, create_time timestamp(6), file_size bigint, file_id varchar(255), file_name varchar(255), file_path varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, storage_path varchar(255), user_id varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table notice ( is_long_valid_data integer, platform integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, content varchar(255), create_time varchar(255), create_user_id varchar(255), markdown_content varchar(255), modify_time varchar(255), modify_user_id varchar(255), title varchar(255), valid_date_time varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table permission ( order_num integer, resource_type integer, parent_id bigint, permission_id bigint generated by default as identity, permission_code varchar(255), permission_name varchar(255), primary key (permission_id) ) Hibernate: create table qiwen_user ( status integer, create_time timestamp(6), update_time timestamp(6), avatar varchar(255), email varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, nickname varchar(255), password varchar(255), phone varchar(255), role varchar(255), username varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table role ( available integer, role_id bigint generated by default as identity, description varchar(255), role_name varchar(255), primary key (role_id) ) Hibernate: create table role_permission ( id bigint generated by default as identity, permission_id bigint, role_id bigint, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table share_file ( expire_days integer, create_time timestamp(6), expire_time timestamp(6), file_path varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, share_batch_num varchar(255), share_code varchar(255), share_token varchar(255), user_id varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table sys_config ( config_key varchar(255), config_value varchar(255), description varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table upload_task ( chunk_num integer, total_chunks integer, upload_status integer, create_time timestamp(6), total_size bigint, file_name varchar(255), file_path varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, identifier varchar(255), user_id varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table user_role ( id bigint generated by default as identity, role_id bigint, user_id varchar(255), primary key (id) ) 2026-06-29T13:37:18.673+08:00 INFO 6500 --- [qiwen-file] [ main] testcase.name: testPreviewTextNotFound
